name: header

meta.docs:
# Header

A sticky top app bar. Composes from a small set of slots: brand name (`HeaderName`), primary navigation (`HeaderNavigation` + `HeaderMenuItem`), and a right-aligned action bar (`HeaderGlobalBar` + `HeaderGlobalAction`).

## When to use

- **Application top bar** — the persistent navigation/branding strip across product pages.
- **Stand-alone tool surfaces** — Storybook canvases, dashboards, internal admin tools.

## When not to use

- **Page-level headings** — that's `Heading` inside a `Section`.
- **Modal title bars** — use `DialogHeader` from the `dialog` wrapper.

## Composition

- `<Header>` renders a sticky `<header>` 48px tall with a bottom border.
- `<HeaderName>` is the brand link. `prefix` renders muted text before the brand (e.g. "Camunda" → "Operate").
- `<HeaderNavigation>` wraps a `<nav>` containing `<HeaderMenuItem>` rows. Items can be marked `isActive` for selected state.
- `<HeaderGlobalBar>` pushes itself to the right (`ml-auto`) and holds icon-only actions (`<HeaderGlobalAction>`).
- All link-style elements support `asChild` to swap the underlying `<a>` for a routing-library `<Link>`.
meta.migrationGuide: # Header — Carbon → shadcn migration guide Carbon ships an entire UIShell family — `Header`, `HeaderContainer`, `HeaderName`, `HeaderNavigation`, `HeaderMenu`, `HeaderMenuItem`, `HeaderGlobalBar`, `HeaderGlobalAction`, `HeaderPanel`, `SideNav`, etc. shadcn ships none of those. This wrapper covers the surface Camunda actually uses today. ## Subset shipped | Carbon | shadcn equivalent | Status | |---|---|---| | `Header` | `Header` | ✓ | | `HeaderName` (with `prefix`) | `HeaderName` | ✓ | | `HeaderNavigation` | `HeaderNavigation` | ✓ | | `HeaderMenuItem` | `HeaderMenuItem` (`isActive` supported) | ✓ | | `HeaderGlobalBar` | `HeaderGlobalBar` | ✓ | | `HeaderGlobalAction` | `HeaderGlobalAction` | ✓ (`tooltipAlignment` is accepted but currently unused — wrap with `Tooltip` externally if needed) | | `HeaderContainer` | not provided | Use plain React state for menu open/close — don't bother with a render-prop container. | | `HeaderMenu` (dropdown nav) | not provided | Compose with `DropdownMenu`. | | `HeaderPanel`, `SideNav`, etc. | not provided | These are out of scope; build with `Sheet` / `Dialog` if needed. | ## Carbon features missing in shadcn - **`HeaderContainer`** — Carbon's render-prop component for managing side-nav open/close state. Use `useState` instead. - **`HeaderMenu`** — dropdown nav from a top-level item. Compose with the local `DropdownMenu` wrapper. - **`HeaderPanel` and side-nav family** — out of scope; use `Sheet` / `Dialog`. - **`SkipToContent`** — provide your own (`Skip to main content`). ## shadcn features missing in Carbon - **`asChild` on `HeaderName` and `HeaderMenuItem`** — wrap a `react-router` `` cleanly. - **`data-active` attribute** — easy CSS targeting. ## Behavioural differences - **No tooltip on `HeaderGlobalAction`** — Carbon ships an integrated tooltip. shadcn relies on `aria-label`; wrap with `` if you need a visual tip. - **Sticky behaviour** — both stick to the top via `position: sticky`. shadcn uses `top-0 z-30`. - **Height** — Carbon: 48px. shadcn: 48px (`h-12`). Match. ## Migration checklist 1. Swap imports. 2. Replace `` with a plain component holding `useState`. 3. Replace `` (dropdown nav) with `` from this package. 4. Add explicit `` wrappers around `` if you want a visible tip. 5. If you used ``, add a manual skip link. 6. Drop `@use '@carbon/styles/scss/components/ui-shell'` imports.
